prompt:
Scene:
Same black studio macro setup and high-speed flash language as the reference image: pure black background, glossy black surface, cool blue rim light, and crisp suspended fragments.

Subject:
A clear thin glass sphere or ornament frozen at the instant it fractures from an unseen impact, centered in frame. Shards radiate outward in a clean halo while the main sphere still partly holds its shape.

Important details:
Photorealistic high-speed photography, millionth-of-a-second freeze, macro lens, razor-sharp transparent shards, realistic glass refraction, tiny dust particles, cool rim highlights, black reflective surface, controlled studio clarity.

Use case:
Final image in a high-speed impact series, preserving the same black studio lighting and frozen-particle style. Square crop-safe gallery card.

Constraints:
Use the reference for studio lighting and freeze-frame style only. No text, no watermark, no logo, no hands, no visible projectile, no colored glass, no cartoon style, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Glass Fracture
description: Glass Fracture freezes a physical impact in a controlled black studio.

depends_on.ref_role: preserve black studio background, flash duration look, rim-lit particles, and macro freeze-frame style

generation.runner_notes: Queue must inject dependency output URLs into ref_urls before execution; image2gen --ref accepts URLs, not local paths.

en.title: Glass Fracture
en.description: Glass Fracture freezes a physical impact in a controlled black studio.
